name: Grok RV Garage Shed - A spacious 20x44 storage and workshop structure
open_features: A generous footprint designed to accommodate RVs, motorhomes, campers, boats, and multiple vehicles with room to spare for tools, shelving, and workspace.
A wide RV-ready overhead door allows easy entry and maneuverability for larger vehicles and trailers.
The gable roof design provides increased interior height, efficient water runoff, and a timeless barn-style silhouette.
Vertical wood siding paired with a sturdy lower masonry base detail creates a refined modern-rustic appearance built for longevity.
description_summary: Kickstart your next property upgrade with the Grok RV Garage Shed - a spacious 20x44 storage and workshop structure designed for durability, functionality, and clean architectural style. Showcasing a tall gable roof, warm vertical wood siding, and a sturdy masonry base detail, Grok combines practical vehicle storage with polished barn-inspired design. The oversized garage door and elongated layout make it ideal for housing RVs, trailers, boats, trucks, and large equipment while still leaving...
